arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta gives update on triple injury blow ahead of crucial Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta gave updates on Jorginho, Thomas Partey and Ben White after Arsenal were held to a frustrating 1-1 draw by Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday

arts.ttl: White, Partey, Jorginho - Arsenal injury news and return dates ahead of Real Madrid second leg - football.london
arts.sum: What Arteta has said: "Ben White couldn’t be in the squad because he felt something again post-training yesterday, so that limits the solutions we have because Jurrien wasn’t ready to start the game either. What Arteta has said: "Calafiori unfortunately picked up a knee injury with his national team.

arts.ttl: Arsenal paid compliment as Real Madrid star fires comeback warning - 'If anyone can'
arts.sum: Arsenal, currently leading 3-0 from the first leg, travel to Real Madrid next week as they bid to reach the Champions League semi-finals following Tuesday night's heroics at the Emirates

arts.ttl: 'They need him' - How Rice shone while other Arsenal stars were rested
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundit Micah Richards praises Declan Rice's "remarkable" energy in Arsenal's 1-1 draw against Brentford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal dealt ‘significant’ injury blow ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta thinks that Jorginho has sustained a “significant” injury days out from their trip to Real Madrid in the Uefa Champions League. The Gunners were held to a 1-1 draw by Brentford at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday after Thomas Partey’s 61st-minute opener was cancelled out by Yoane Wissa. Kieran Tierney also […] The post Arsenal dealt ‘significant’ injury blow ahead of Real Madrid clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms huge Real Madrid injury return before Arsenal second leg
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti has issued a massive injury update before Arsenal travel to the Bernabeu for their Champions League quarter-final second leg. Asked if he can play against Alaves in La Liga and then Arsenal just a few days later, Ancelotti said: "He's available for tomorrow and for Arsenal." Madrid will have 24 hours less to prepare for the second leg after La Liga rejected their request to bring the game forward which left Ancelotti far from pleased.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel Martinelli fumes over 'nasty' tackle that 'could have broke my leg' after Brentford's Christian Norgaard escaped red card in 1-1 stalemate
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli has hit out at a 'nasty' tackle from Christian Norgaard that he claims 'could have broke my leg', after the Brentford midfielder escaped a red card during Arsenal's 1-1 draw at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: 'He could break my leg' - Arsenal given red card verdict after 'nasty' Gabriel Martinelli tackle - football.london
arts.sum: Former Premier League midfielder Steve Sidwell has claimed that Christian Norgaard's tackle on Arsenal winger Gabriel Martinelli was on the borderline of a red card. "When you're seeing the replays, if a red card was given, you wouldn't go against it," Sidwell said.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides triple Arsenal injury update as possible Real Madrid selection crisis emerges
arts.sum: Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta provides a triple injury update after his side were held to a 1-1 draw by London rivals Brentford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye Real Madrid's Guler - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United up their pursuit of a new goalkeeper, Chelsea are after a new winger, and Arsenal want young Real Madrid attacker.
